meta.titleDefault: Window, façade and property maintenance · J. Versseput
meta.description: J. Versseput is your trusted partner for window, façade and property maintenance. We keep commercial property across the Netherlands presentable and valuable, with craftsmanship spanning three generations.

overview.metaDescription: J. Versseput provides window, façade and property maintenance throughout the Netherlands, with landing pages for Amsterdam, Rotterdam, The Hague, Utrecht and Eindhoven.
overview.intro: Our home base is The Hague and with our own team and equipment we are available nationwide. Below you will find our pages by city, with an emphasis on the largest cities in the Netherlands.
overview.notListed: Don't see your city? We work throughout the Netherlands with our own team and equipment.

glas-en-gevelonderhoud.title: Window and façade maintenance
glas-en-gevelonderhoud.summary: The visible calling card of your building, expertly kept clean from the ground floor to the high-rise. Glass inside and out, frames and trim included as standard.

gevelreiniging.title: Façade cleaning
gevelreiniging.summary: Experience with every façade material and type of soiling, with advice on the most sustainable method.

zonnepanelenreiniging.title: Solar panel cleaning
zonnepanelenreiniging.summary: Clean panels yield more. We keep your installation clear and performing at its best.

dakgootreiniging.title: Gutter cleaning
dakgootreiniging.summary: Clear gutters prevent leaks and wood rot, handled in a single visit during maintenance.

hogedrukreiniging.title: Pressure washing
hogedrukreiniging.summary: Paving, grounds and entrances looking fresh again, for a well-kept first impression.

opleveringsschoonmaak.title: Handover and construction cleaning
opleveringsschoonmaak.summary: A new or renovated building handed over broom-clean to showroom-ready.

specialistische-reiniging.title: Specialist cleaning
specialistische-reiniging.summary: Complex work at height and on unusual surfaces where others bow out.

periodiek-onderhoud.title: Periodic cleaning maintenance
periodiek-onderhoud.summary: A fixed rhythm that keeps your building presentable all year round, without any hassle.

hero.title: Your reliable partner in <accent>window, façade and property maintenance</accent>.
hero.intro: We keep property presentable and protect its value with craftsmanship that has been passed down for three generations. One reliable partner for everything on the outside of your building, throughout the Netherlands.

items.body: Our teams and fleet work on large, landmark buildings across the Randstad and beyond.

commercieel.blurb: Offices, hotels, retail and high-rise buildings.

assurance.intro: We are VCA certified and professionally insured. We maintain every building to the strictest safety and environmental guidelines, with a permanent, trained team.

items.title: Professionally insured
items.body: Should anything unexpectedly go wrong, the work is fully insured and we handle it properly.

items.title: Safe working at height
items.body: As a VCA-certified company we work to the strictest safety guidelines, with a risk assessment for every building.

items.title: Environmentally conscious
items.body: Pure water and the most environmentally friendly method, tailored to every surface.

about.title: A family business that is redefining the standard in <accent>property maintenance</accent>.
about.p1: The origins of J. Versseput lie in window cleaning, started more than sixty years ago in the heart of The Hague and grown from father to son into a professional organisation. We bring that same dedication today to the largest and most striking buildings in the country.
about.p2: We work with presentable, well-spoken staff who treat every building with the same care, from the first visit to the last. Our ambition is clear. We want to be the most reliable and most premium partner in property maintenance in the Netherlands.

items.q: Which regions does J. Versseput operate in?
items.a: Our home base is The Hague. With our own equipment and team we are available throughout the Netherlands, with an emphasis on the Randstad.

items.q: Do you work for both business and private clients?
items.a: Yes. Our focus is on commercial property such as property managers, owners' associations, offices and government, but private clients in the higher segment are also welcome.

items.q: Up to what height can you work?
items.a: With our aerial platforms we reach up to thirty-six metres and with the telewash system up to fifteen metres. For high-rise buildings we use the building's own façade installation wherever possible.

items.q: How often is the maintenance carried out?
items.a: We prefer to work to a fixed interval that suits your building and its surroundings, so it looks well-kept all year round. One-off work is of course also possible.

items.q: Are you insured and do you work safely?
items.a: Yes. We are VCA certified and professionally insured, and we work to the strictest safety guidelines with a risk assessment for every building.

items.q: How quickly will I get a reply to my request?
items.a: We respond to your quote request within one business day and are happy to think along with you about the best approach.

contactForm.heading: Ready to get your property in <accent>top condition</accent>?
